title: osmorhiza aristata var. brevistylis
intro: Osmorhiza aristata var. brevistylis, commonly known as sweet cicely or tall sweet cicely, is a perennial plant species in the family Apiaceae, native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and nausea, due to its carminative and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Osmorhiza aristata var. brevistylis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for medicinal purposes, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
